article.title: China bypasses US GPU bans with 1.54-exaflops 'LineShine' supercomputer — CPU-only monster packs 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores
article.summary: China's National Supercomputing Center in Shenzhen takes a page from Japan's Fugaku supercomputer and Fujitsu's A64FX processor, build LineShine supercomputer based entirely on Armv9-based LineShine LX2 CPUs.
article.title_zh: 中國繞過美國GPU禁令，推出1.54艾浮點「LineShine」超級電腦——純CPU怪獸配備240萬華為設計的Armv9核心
article.summary_zh: 中國深圳國家超級計算中心效仿日本Fugaku超級電腦和富士通A64FX處理器，基於Armv9架構LineShine LX2 CPU構建LineShine超級電腦。

article.title: ArXiv to Ban Researchers for a Year if They Submit AI Slop
article.title_zh: ArXiv 將禁止提交 AI 垃圾內容的研究人員一年

article.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
article.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.
article.title_zh: 研究存儲庫 ArXiv 將禁止讓 AI 完成所有工作的作者一年
article.summary_zh: ArXiv 正在加強對科學論文中大語言模型草率使用的打擊。

article.title: OpenClaw creator burned through $1.3 million in OpenAI API tokens in a single month — bill covered 603 billion tokens across 7.6 million requests and 100 coding agents
article.summary: The bill covered 603 billion tokens across 7.6 million requests, all generated by roughly 100 Codex instances.
article.title_zh: OpenClaw創建者在單月內花費130萬美元的OpenAI API代幣——帳單涵蓋6030億個代幣，跨越760萬次請求和100個編碼代理
article.summary_zh: 帳單涵蓋6030億個代幣，跨越760萬次請求，全由約100個Codex實例產生。

article.title: How to remove your personal data from the internet (and why you can’t afford to wait)
article.summary: Data brokers make a living by selling your personal information for profit. Your phone number, email, home address, and Social Security number could be packaged and sold to spammers, scammers, and identity thieves right now. Your privacy loss is their gain. Apple’s privacy protections can help block some but not all tracking as data harvesting efforts become increasingly sophisticated. If you want to proactively and continuously remove your personal data from broker databases, Incogni makes it easier than ever to fight back and regain control of your privacy. more…
article.title_zh: 如何從網際網路上移除你的個人資料（以及為什麼你不能再等待）
article.summary_zh: 資料仲介靠販售你的個人資訊牟利，你的電話號碼、電子郵件、住址和社會安全號碼可能現在就被打包出售給垃圾郵件發送者、詐騙犯和身分盜竊者。

article.title: Google’s new Gemini Intelligence will only be available on a handful of the best current Android flagships for now
article.summary: A few days ago, Google announced Gemini Intelligence, which seems to be more than just a rebranding effort. It’s actually an impressive set of features that, among other things, can automate multi-step tasks and execute them entirely in the background on its own, including things like sourcing and transforming information and interacting with various apps and websites autonomously on your behalf. There is even a “Rambler” component coming to Gboard that lets you talk freely with any and all filler or crutch words that most of us unintentionally use, and even mix languages in the same...
article.title_zh: Google 新推出的 Gemini Intelligence 目前僅限部分頂級 Android 旗艦機使用
article.summary_zh: Google 宣佈的 Gemini Intelligence 不僅是重新命名，而是一套令人印象深刻的功能集合，可自動執行多步驟任務並在背景獨立運行。

article.title: The Core Ultra 7 270K was too good, so Intel scrapped the flagship Core Ultra 9 290K Plus — benchmarks of the 290K prototype find slim 2% faster performance in gaming and applications
article.summary: The Core Ultra 9 290K Plus, which never came out, was only marginally faster than the Core Ultra 7 270K Plus, which explains why Intel ultimately chose not to release it. On average across 1080p and 1440p games, it's only about 2% faster, and in synthetic benchmarks and productivity workloads, it's less than 4% ahead.
article.title_zh: Core Ultra 7 270K 表現太強，Intel 取消旗艦 Core Ultra 9 290K Plus — 290K 原型機基準測試顯示遊戲和應用效能僅快 2%
article.summary_zh: 從未發售的 Core Ultra 9 290K Plus 相比 Core Ultra 7 270K Plus 效能提升有限，平均遊戲效能僅快約 2%，這解釋了 Intel 最終決定不發布該產品的原因。

article.title: US FTC reportedly launches antitrust probe into Arm following its launch of its own AGI CPU — regulators investigate if chip designer is restricting architecture access to rivals
article.summary: The U.S. FTC is looking into Arm Holdings to see if it's abusing its market position as a dominant chip designer to gives its new chip manufacturing business an advantage over competitors who build semiconductors based on Arm designs.
article.title_zh: 美國FTC據報對Arm啟動反壟斷調查，調查其推出自有AGI CPU後的行為——監管機構調查晶片設計師是否限制競爭對手對架構的存取
article.summary_zh: 美國FTC正調查Arm Holdings是否濫用其作為主導晶片設計商的市場地位，以便為其新晶片製造業務相對基於Arm設計的半導體製造商提供優勢。

article.title: Google hasn’t shown any reason for ‘Googlebook’ laptops to exist, so why should we be excited?
article.summary: We’ve been hearing about Google’s behind-the-scenes work to move its laptop efforts over to Android, but now that we’ve seen “Googlebook,” I’m not really sure I’m sold yet. Honestly, I don’t think Google has shown any reason for these laptops to exist at all. more…
article.title_zh: Google尚未展示「Googlebook」筆記本電腦存在的理由，那我們為什麼要興奮？
article.summary_zh: 我們一直聽說Google在幕後將筆記本電腦工作轉移到Android上，但現在看到「Googlebook」，我並不確定是否真正認同，我認為Google根本沒有展示這些筆記本電腦存在的任何理由。

article.title: 輝達 Rubin AI 平台對 LPDDR 需求量將超過蘋果與三星智慧手機需求總和
article.summary: 隨著代理型 AI (Agentic AI) 的應用快速發展，AI 伺服器對記憶體的需求正迎來驚人的成長。根據 […]
article.title_zh: 輝達 Rubin AI 平台對 LPDDR 需求量將超過蘋果與三星智慧手機需求總和
article.summary_zh: 隨著代理型 AI (Agentic AI) 的應用快速發展，AI 伺服器對記憶體的需求正迎來驚人的成長。根據 […]

article.title: Maker packs an opinionated, googly-eyed AI chatbot into a mobile suitcase, powered by an Nvidia Jetson — entirely local machine entity runs Gemma 4 E4B and can respond in 200ms
article.summary: Sparky is an opinionated googly-eyed AI in a suitcase powered by an Nvidia Jetson Orin NS Super 16GB.
article.title_zh: 製造商將一個固執己見、眼睛圓凸的AI聊天機器人打包進行動公事包，由Nvidia Jetson驅動——完全本地化機器實體運行Gemma 4 E4B，可在200毫秒內回應
article.summary_zh: Sparky是一個固執己見的眼睛圓凸AI助手，放在由Nvidia Jetson Orin NS Super 16GB驅動的公事包中。

article.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [May 2026]
article.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages. more…
article.title_zh: Google Messages 新增功能推出情況 [2026年5月]
article.summary_zh: 與其他 Google 應用類似，Messages for Android 進行許多 A/B 測試；RCS/SMS 客戶端推出新功能的時間通常較長。

article.title: Wondering where your OxygenOS update is? OnePlus quietly hit pause
article.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR OnePlus has paused the rollout of OxygenOS version 16.0.7.XXX and 16.0.5.XXX. The rollout was paused due to devices experiencing abnormal restart and boot issues. The rollout will resume after the issue is fixed and the builds are validated for stability and reliability. OnePlus recently began rolling out an OxygenOS update. If you’re wondering why it’s still not available for your OnePlus device, it’s because the rollout was paused. However, it shouldn’t be long before the rollout resumes. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: 想知道你的 OxygenOS 更新在哪？OnePlus 悄悄暫停了推出
article.summary_zh: OnePlus 已暫停 OxygenOS 版本 16.0.7.XXX 和 16.0.5.XXX 的推出，因為設備出現異常重啟和啟動問題。
